mapper.select: SELECT PosID AS positionID, PosName AS positionName, UpdatedTime AS updatedTime FROM positions ORDER BY PosID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO positions (PosName, UpdatedTime) VALUES ( #{positionName}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE positions SET PosName = #{positionName}, UpdatedTime = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE PosID = #{positionID}
